headline: Investors dive back into frontier markets after April rally
summary: (Bloomberg) -- Investors are piling back into some of the riskiest markets, as demand for frontier assets picks up after an initial war-driven selloff.Most Read from BloombergThe Billion-Barrel Hormuz Oil Shock Is About to Crash DemandGunman Detained, Trump Evacuated After Shooting at Press DinnerTrump Scraps US Trip for Iran Talks, Leaving Ceasefire in LimboGoogle Plans to Invest Up to $40 Billion in AnthropicThe Hottest Phone for Kids Right Now Is a $100 LandlineThe MSCI Frontier Markets Index
